finance.title: Aave records $6 billion TVL drop as Kelp hack exposes structural risk at DeFi lender
finance.blurb: The AAVE token fell 16% and deposits fled the protocol after attackers used drained rsETH as collateral to borrow wrapped ether, leaving Aave to quantify how much bad debt it is now carrying.
